message:
feat(router): add 308 Permanent Redirect support for route lookups

Previously, the RouteLookup enum only handled MethodNotAllowed and NotFound
cases after successful route resolution. This change adds a new Redirect
variant that enables clean URL redirects (e.g., trailing slash normalization)
while preserving the original HTTP method via 308 Permanent Redirect.

Key implementation details:
- RouteLookup::Redirect { target } variant returns 308 status code
- Location header set to the redirect target URL
- 308 (vs 301/302) ensures POST/PUT requests maintain their method
- Integrates cleanly with existing match_route() -> dispatch flow

This enables patterns like:
- /api/users → /api/users/ (trailing slash normalization)
- /old-path → /new-path (permanent moves without method change)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
